title: Aha! Roadmaps official positioning
claim: Aha! Roadmaps emphasizes visual roadmaps, audience-specific views, and broad roadmap communication for product plans.
source_snippet: The roadmap page focuses on creating and sharing visual timelines tailored for different audiences.
implication: ProductOS should preserve communication clarity while linking roadmap-ready views back to discovery evidence and gate outcomes.
followup_questions: Where does Aha preserve artifact lineage from market insight through roadmap output?
